title: ophrestia pentaphylla
intro: Ophrestia pentaphylla is a plant species, also known as the five-leaved ophrestia, that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ophrestia pentaphylla include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions. Ophrestia pentaphylla is prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its roots are used in traditional medicine to create various remedies.
